# CORE_UPDATES - Tavily Search

## Rule
Apply updates only to relevant core files for this skill.
If wrapper guidance conflicts with skill docs, skill docs win.

## Relevant (update allowed)
- AGENTS.md
- TOOLS.md
- MEMORY.md

## Optional (only if explicitly needed)
- USER.md

## Non-relevant (do not edit)
- SOUL.md
- IDENTITY.md
- HEARTBEAT.md

## Suggested snippets
### AGENTS.md
- Add trigger/use statement for Tavily web search tasks.

### TOOLS.md
- Add env requirement and command/tool usage pattern for Tavily.

### MEMORY.md
- Store persistent constraints and routing for Tavily usage.
